meta.source: golden-build.js prototype clustering @0.83 + regex FP-bait, hand-adjudicated by Aryan

legend.blob_negative: expected SPLIT — single-linkage chain, must NOT be one cluster
legend.grayzone_separate: expected SEPARATE — same template, different event
legend.fn_singleton: KNOWN cross-lingual miss — should have merged (recall gap)

meta.how_to_use: Re-cluster the article_ids with the candidate clusterer. For each group: merge → all ids in one cluster; separate/split → ids land in >1 cluster; alone → id is a singleton. Score precision/recall + B-cubed against expected.
